scripts.format: prettier --write README.md package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.json "*.config.{js,ts}" ".github/**/*.yml" "scripts/**/*.mjs" "src/**/*.ts" "content/post/*.post.ts" "docs/adr/*.md"
scripts.format:check: prettier --check README.md package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.json "*.config.{js,ts}" ".github/**/*.yml" "scripts/**/*.mjs" "src/**/*.ts" "content/post/*.post.ts" "docs/adr/*.md"
scripts.validate: pnpm posts:check && pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
